introSection: Flitzer is a steel travelling roller coaster built by German manufacturer Zierer currently owned by US carnival operator Deggeller Attractions.

sections.title: History
sections.content:
It opened at Playland's Castaway Cove in Ocean City, New Jersey, USA in 1994. It was closed and removed in 2015 along with Python to make way for three new roller coasters.

Flitzer was purchased in November 2015 by Deggeller Attractions, based in Florida. The ride now appears at many fairs in the United States.

fullText:
Flitzer is a steel travelling roller coaster built by German manufacturer Zierer currently owned by US carnival operator Deggeller Attractions.

It opened at Playland's Castaway Cove in Ocean City, New Jersey, USA in 1994. It was closed and removed in 2015 along with Python to make way for three new roller coasters.

Flitzer was purchased in November 2015 by Deggeller Attractions, based in Florida. The ride now appears at many fairs in the United States.
